name_en: New Gucci 👉 Dionysus series, inspired by Dionysus, one of the Greek gods. The double tiger head lock carries the romantic symbol of guarding love and vows, reflecting a unique creative vision. It hits the heart at first glance.
name_cn:
New Gucci 👉 Dionysus series, inspired by Dionysus, one of the Greek gods. The double tiger head lock carries the romantic symbol of guarding love and vows, reflecting a unique creative vision. It hits the heart at first glance.
Model: 739496.
Dimensions: 24cm bottom width × 16cm height × 11cm depth.
(20.5cm top width) (Handle drop 23cm height)
Color: Khaki / PVC.
